# Canonical Stack — Backend (Kotlin / JVM)

_Applies when: building or modifying a Kotlin/JVM backend service in this org._

> **Starter stub — not settled canon.** Kotlin has no production rules in agent-core yet.
> This is the initial JVM analog of `05-stack.md`, to be expanded and ADR-backed as the
> first Kotlin service lands. Treat entries as defaults to confirm, not decisions already made.
> Stack-agnostic backend truths (contract-first, release order, RLS-as-SSOT, env-secrets)
> live in `04-backend.md`, which this stack extends.

## The stack (Kotlin analog of the canonical TS stack)

- **Language**: Kotlin (JVM), null-safe. Konform (or annotation-based validation) as the
  runtime-validation + shared-contract analog of Zod.
- **Build**: Gradle (Kotlin DSL); version catalogs for dependency versioning (the pnpm/Turbo analog).
- **Framework**: Spring Boot or Ktor — pick per service and record the choice in an ADR.
- **Persistence**: Exposed / jOOQ or JPA/Hibernate, with Flyway (or Liquibase) migrations.
- **Architecture**: Clean / Hexagonal (ports & adapters) as the boundary-enforced analog of FSD.
- **Quality tooling**: ktlint + detekt as a zero-warning gate (the `--max-warnings=0` analog);
  JUnit 5 + Kotest + MockK for tests (the Vitest + Testing Library analog).
- **Secrets**: env vars; never hardcode (see `04-backend.md`).

## Quality gate (Kotlin analog)

- ktlint + detekt clean; compile + the full test suite (JUnit 5 / Kotest) green — not just a
  smoke test.
- Gradle `build` succeeds. Follow the shared release order in `04-backend.md`.
